name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_STRONGPOINT_EAST
notes: INFANTRY STRONGPOINT — MANNED EAST variant (flag WFBE_C_DEF_FORT_MANNED). Mirrors the WEST manned layout exactly; the only change is the weapon family: DShKM heavy MGs (DSHKM_TK_INS_EP1, the same EAST static every DEFMENU_V2 EAST composition uses — also fits GUER/TKA, which resolve to _EAST in Server_ConstructPosition.sqf). Two manned DShKs at the rampart forward corners with inward-canted interlocking arcs across the frontal approach.

objs.role: comms trench — links left flank to the bunker
comms trench — links right flank to the bunker
MANNED DShKM — left rampart corner, arc canted right-front (interlocks with right gun)
MANNED DShKM — right rampart corner, arc canted left-front (interlocks with left gun)
